nodes.name: St. Lucia thrasher
nodes.summary: St. Lucia thrasher（St. Lucia thrasher，学名 Ramphocinclus sanctaeluciae），主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: However the species was rediscovered in 1932 near Desbarras. In 1987 a census by the University of East Anglia found only 58 pairs. Its greatest threat has historically been habitat destruction, with land clearing for plantations and destructions caused by livestock being the driving factors.
